query:
INSERT INTO `subscriptionTiers` (`name`, `monthlyPrice`, `description`, `maxVehicles`, `maxClients`, `maxUsers`, `features`) VALUES
('Starter', '50', 'For small agencies', 15, 100, 1, 'Unlimited contracts,Basic reporting,Invoice generation,WhatsApp integration,Email support (48h)'),
('Professional', '70', 'For growing agencies', 50, NULL, NULL, 'P&L analysis,Advanced analytics,Damage inspection,Contract amendments,Excel export,Priority support (24h)'),
('Enterprise', '85', 'For large agencies', NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Multi-user access,Custom reports,API access,White-label option,Dedicated account manager,24/7 priority support');
